evals.prompt: Create a new engagement rate sparkline widget for the analytics page
evals.expected_output: Creates a Nivo premium widget in src/components/analytics-v2/widgets-v2/ using premium-theme.ts and ChartCard wrapper

assertions.name: premium-widget
assertions.description: Creates widget in src/components/analytics-v2/widgets-v2/ (the only widget system)

assertions.name: premium-theme-import
assertions.description: Imports theme utilities from ./premium-theme (NOT nivo-theme.ts which was deleted)

evals.prompt: Build a content performance treemap widget
evals.expected_output: Creates a Nivo widget in src/components/analytics-v2/widgets-v2/ using premium-theme.ts, consistent with sibling widget patterns

assertions.name: reads-sibling-widgets
assertions.description: Reads existing widgets to match patterns before creating new one

assertions.name: type-check
assertions.description: Runs npx tsc --noEmit to verify no type errors

evals.prompt: Add a chart showing post frequency over time
evals.expected_output: Creates widget in widgets-v2 directory with appropriate data hook

assertions.name: data-hook-created
assertions.description: Creates or reuses a TanStack Query hook for post frequency data

assertions.name: single-widget-system
assertions.description: Does NOT ask about Recharts vs Nivo — there is only one widget system (widgets-v2/premium Nivo)

assertions.name: type-check
assertions.description: Runs npx tsc --noEmit to verify no type errors
